turns.user_message: I've noticed my heart starts beating really fast for no clear reason. It makes me feel a bit on edge for the rest of the day.
These sudden rushes of panic are happening more often now. I feel my chest tighten and I have to stop what I'm doing.
I'm constantly braced for that awful feeling to hit me out of nowhere. It feels like I'm losing control over my own body.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something they noticed about themselves.
